jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at RML Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
